title: Nexus ListWorksQuery
description: Query parameters for GET /v1/local/works (cursor-based pagination + sort, F-P1 / F-F1).

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by the previous response's `pagination.next_cursor`.

sort.description: Comma-separated sort terms. Allowed keys: `updated_at` (default), `title`, `status`, `intake_status`. Prefix `-` for descending.
